message:
feat: add genome context to Learn prompts and resilient JSON parsing

The reasonAboutImprovement LLM prompt now includes existing agents,
memories, and the stumbling agent's current system prompt so the LLM
can make informed improvement suggestions. JSON parsing now strips
markdown code block wrappers before parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
